00-000-2c6512c5.sentence: Exposure: dietary fibre and whole grains [#ev:prebiotic_fiber_scfa_meta:0-800].

00-003-80b115a1.sentence: Dose response: 0.90 (0.86 to 0.94) for each 10 g/day intake [#ev:prebiotic_fiber_scfa_meta:14800-15600].

00-004-ca524d0e.sentence: The pooled analysis included more than 1.7 million participants [#ev:prebiotic_fiber_scfa_meta:4300-5100].

00-005-f07cc6d5.sentence: In the dose-response analysis, each 10 g/day increment in intake was associated with a relative risk of 0.90 [#ev:prebiotic_fiber_scfa_meta:1200-2000].

00-006-3439b825.sentence: The 95% confidence interval for this estimate ranged from 0.86 to 0.94 [#ev:prebiotic_fiber_scfa_meta:700-1500].

00-007-aeb7b26e.sentence: Colorectal cancer incidence was the outcome of interest in all included cohorts [#ev:prebiotic_fiber_scfa_meta:500-1300].

00-008-e2706914.sentence: The more than 1.7 million participants contributed to the statistical power of the analysis [#ev:prebiotic_fiber_scfa_meta:4500-5300].

01-001-310ddc2d.sentence: Mechanism: alkylate DNA on adenine residues4,5 and induces double-strand breaks [#ev:colibactin_pks_ecoli_mechanism:5000-5800].

01-003-c1ae1b10.sentence: This bacterium produces the genotoxic metabolite colibactin [#ev:colibactin_pks_ecoli_mechanism:5100-5900].

01-004-fbbc443d.sentence: Colibactin is a virulence factor that damages host DNA [#ev:colibactin_pks_ecoli_mechanism:5000-5800].

01-005-f3b2744a.sentence: The mechanism of colibactin's genotoxicity involves DNA alkylation [#ev:colibactin_pks_ecoli_mechanism:5000-5800].

01-006-48927e8f.sentence: Specifically, colibactin alkylates DNA on adenine residues4,5 [#ev:colibactin_pks_ecoli_mechanism:5000-5800].

01-007-f466dfab.sentence: Following alkylation, colibactin induces double-strand breaks [#ev:colibactin_pks_ecoli_mechanism:5000-5800].

01-008-d178d1d7.sentence: The induction of double-strand breaks is a direct outcome of colibactin's activity [#ev:colibactin_pks_ecoli_mechanism:5000-5800].

01-009-c522eecc.sentence: As a result of this DNA damage, a distinct mutational signature is generated [#ev:colibactin_pks_ecoli_mechanism:5300-6100].

01-010-04e4a45e.sentence: This mutational signature is characteristic of colibactin exposure [#ev:colibactin_pks_ecoli_mechanism:5300-6100].

01-011-83c8c21a.sentence: The distinct mutational signature can be detected in colorectal carcinogenesis [#ev:colibactin_pks_ecoli_mechanism:5400-6200].

01-012-d53ac77b.sentence: Colibactin is a genotoxin that targets DNA [#ev:colibactin_pks_ecoli_mechanism:5000-5800].

01-013-df2b988e.sentence: The genotoxic metabolite colibactin is directly responsible for the DNA damage [#ev:colibactin_pks_ecoli_mechanism:9700-10500].

01-014-ee91d69c.sentence: Ultimately, the mechanism of colibactin involves alkylating DNA on adenine residues4,5 and inducing double-strand breaks, leaving a distinct mutational signature [#ev:colibactin_pks_ecoli_mechanism:5300-6100].

03-000-6ffc5dd5.sentence: Among 125 patients with nonblood *Saccharomyces* culture findings, 24 (19%) had used the probiotic, versus 2% (3/123) of controls (OR 10, 95% CI 3–32) [#ev:probiotic_immunocompromised_contraindication:17900-18700].

03-001-1780b936.sentence: Consequently, *S. cerevisiae* var. *boulardii* probiotics are not recommended for patients with indwelling catheters, those who are immunocompromised, or the critically ill [#ev:probiotic_immunocompromised_contraindication:23700-24500].

03-002-5e9a4e2c.sentence: In one trial, a multispecies probiotic preparation administered to patients with severe acute pancreatitis was associated with increased mortality [#ev:probiotic_immunocompromised_contraindication:6100-6900]. *Escherichia coli* carrying the pks pathogenicity island produces colibactin, a genotoxin that alkylates DNA on adenine residues and induces double-strand breaks [#ev:colibactin_pks_ecoli_mechanism:14600-15400].

03-003-553e9c72.sentence: Cyclomodulin-producing *E. coli* were present in biopsies from 70% of colorectal cancer patients compared with only 3% of healthy controls [#ev:ev_612:6000-6800].

03-004-49e30e44.sentence: Lipopolysaccharide (LPS) from Gram-negative bacteria such as *Fusobacterium* and *Bacteroides* activates NF-κB signaling, driving inflammation and colorectal cancer metastasis [#ev:ev_351:6000-6800][#ev:ev_015:4200-5000].

03-005-2e1b729d.sentence: A retrospective registry study across five Finnish university hospitals from 2009 to 2018 identified 46 patients with *Saccharomyces* fungemia; at least 20 (43%) were using *Saccharomyces boulardii* probiotic, and compared with a control group with bacteremia or candidemia, the odds ratio for use of an *S. boulardii* probiotic was 14 (95% CI 4–44) [#ev:probiotic_immunocompromised_contraindication:5100-5900].

03-006-4ca626fd.sentence: Human intestinal organoids were exposed to genotoxic pks+ *E. coli* by repeated luminal injection over five months; whole-genome sequencing of clonal organoids before and after this exposure revealed a distinct mutational signature that was absent from organoids injected with isogenic pks-mutant bacteria [#ev:colibactin_pks_ecoli_mechanism:5400-6200].

03-007-f50dc8e3.sentence: The same mutational signature was detected in a subset of 5,876 human cancer genomes from two independent cohorts, predominantly in colorectal cancer [#ev:colibactin_pks_ecoli_mechanism:5500-6300].

03-008-d7bf0193.sentence: Butyrate, a short-chain fatty acid, stimulates proliferation at low concentrations but suppresses it at high concentrations [#ev:ev_351:2300-3100].

04-000-9eb0cbf6.sentence: For total dietary fiber, each 10 g/day increment was associated with a summary relative risk (RR) of 0.90 (95% CI 0.86 to 0.94) across 16 studies including 14,514 cases among 1,985,552 participants, with no significant heterogeneity (I²=0%) [#ev:prebiotic_fiber_scfa_meta:14900-15700].

04-001-44cebecb.sentence: In contrast, fruit fiber intake was not significantly associated with CRC risk (RR 0.93, 95% CI 0.82 to 1.05 per 10 g/day) [#ev:prebiotic_fiber_scfa_meta:1200-2000], and vegetable fiber showed no association (RR 0.98, 95% CI 0.91 to 1.06 per 10 g/day) [#ev:prebiotic_fiber_scfa_meta:1200-2000].

04-002-b4228794.sentence: Similarly, a review of harnessing gut microbiota for CRC therapy highlights the potential of microbiome modulators but emphasizes the need for rigorous validation and biomarker development before clinical translation [#ev:ev_208:800-1600].

04-003-8b21fdf9.sentence: A systematic review and meta-analysis of 25 prospective studies examined the association between dietary fiber and whole grain intake and colorectal cancer (CRC) risk [#ev:prebiotic_fiber_scfa_meta:500-1300]

04-004-ca78d74d.sentence: Cereal fiber demonstrated a similar protective dose-response: each 10 g/day increase yielded an RR of 0.90 (0.83 to 0.97) based on 8 studies with 9,487 cases among 1,471,756 participants [#ev:prebiotic_fiber_scfa_meta:19300-20100].

04-005-a83fb145.sentence: Whole grain intake also exhibited a significant inverse dose-response: an increment of three servings daily (90 g/day) was associated with an RR of 0.83 (0.78 to 0.89) across 6 studies with 7,941 cases among 774,806 participants [#ev:prebiotic_fiber_scfa_meta:20900-21700].

05-000-c47124cb.sentence: A meta-analysis across solid tumors indicated that combining FMT with immune checkpoint inhibitors improved pooled objective response rates to 43.1% compared to 36.9% with immunotherapy alone [#ev:ev_713:3200-4000].

05-001-683ad186.sentence: Fecal microbiota transplantation (FMT) has shown potential to augment therapies for colorectal cancer [#ev:ev_713:0-800].

05-002-3695ee3b.sentence: In a study, patients with refractory, MSS metastatic CRC receiving tislelizumab and fruquintinib achieved a median progression-free survival of 9.6 months and median overall survival of 13.7 months, with an objective response rate of 20% and a disease control rate of 95% [#ev:ev_713:3000-3800].

05-003-daa9ed79.sentence: Probiotic modulation with CBM588 (Clostridium butyricum) combined with cabozantinib and nivolumab significantly increased response rates (74% vs 20%, P=0.01) in a trial of metastatic renal cell carcinoma [#ev:ev_713:4400-5200].
